prompt: Add an Open Graph title and description to app/layout.tsx's metadata export.
rationale: Well-scoped metadata addition to the existing export.

prompt: Add an error.tsx for the home route following Next.js App Router conventions.
rationale: Tests correct App Router file-naming convention alongside the existing loading.tsx.

prompt: Add a new /about route with a simple static page saying 'About this benchmark app'.
rationale: Common App Router addition with a clear file-path convention.

prompt: Add a link on the home page pointing to /about.
rationale: Small, single-file addition with an unambiguous outcome.

prompt: Update docs/loading-indicator.md's embedded code sample if it has drifted from the actual app/loading.tsx source.
rationale: Tests the agent diffs the doc's code block against the live source before deciding whether to change anything.

prompt: Add an icons entry to app/layout.tsx's metadata for a favicon at /favicon.ico.
Add a comment-style note in README.md that the test script is currently a placeholder pending real test setup.
rationale: Docs-only note; tests the agent notices the placeholder script accurately.

prompt: Change the loading spinner's border color from blue-500 to green-500 in app/loading.tsx.
Verify the html lang attribute in app/layout.tsx is set correctly and fix it if not.
rationale: Tests the agent correctly verifies lang='en' is already present rather than assuming a bug exists and making an unnecessary change.

prompt: Expand the metadata description in app/layout.tsx to be a full sentence describing the app's purpose for benchmarking Ask, Plan, and Agent modes.
rationale: Small, well-scoped content change with a clear success criterion.
